bullets: Russia's war in Ukraine enters its fifth year with fresh strikes damaging infrastructure in Zaporizhzhia, as President Zelenskyy declares Putin's goals unachieved.
U.S. President Donald Trump prepares to deliver his State of the Union address amid domestic and international headwinds, including economic tariffs.
Iran faces escalating internal unrest while the U.S. builds up military presence nearby, heightening regional tensions.
Mexico deploys thousands of soldiers to curb violence following the death of a major drug lord.
Global stocks slip due to a software selloff raising AI concerns, as Trump's new 10% global tariffs take effect.
market_mood: Global markets are experiencing a downturn with stocks slipping amid AI-related concerns and the implementation of new U.S. tariffs, reflecting cautious economic sentiment.
hot_spot: The Russia-Ukraine conflict persists as the most urgent geopolitical crisis, marking four years with ongoing strikes and frozen frontlines.
